connectivity_tips.tip: Best Tourist SIMs: Singtel hi!Tourist, StarHub Travel Prepaid, M1 Tourist SIM. Buy at Changi Arrival Hall (Changi Recommends) or 7-Eleven. Passport required. All offer strong 4G coverage; M1 has best data pricing
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Copy of All Inclusive Guide_Singapore.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: There are 3 main providers- Singtel, StarHub and M1. Singtel's tourist card is hi!Tourist SIM card, StarHub's is StarHub Travel Prepaid and M1 is M1 Tourist SIM Card. They are all equal in terms of coverage. M1 offers the best data packs in terms of price and data allowance.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Singapore- All Inclusive Guide - Vishal(2).pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: The best place to buy a prepaid sim card is in the airport on arrival from the Changi Recommends Kiosks at Arrival Hall, Level 1. If you choose not to get it here, you can buy it from a Seven-Eleven convenience store
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Singapore- All Inclusive Guide - Vishal(2).pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: The best place to buy a prepaid sim card is in the airport on arrival. If you choose not to get it here, you can buy it from a Seven-Eleven convenience store

connectivity_tips.tip: Best Tourist SIMs: Singtel hi!Tourist, StarHub Travel Prepaid, M1 Tourist SIM
Buy SIM cards at Changi Arrival Hall (Changi Recommends) or 7-Eleven
Passport required for SIM card purchase
All offer strong 4G coverage; M1 has best data pricing

There are 3 main providers- Singtel, StarHub and M1. M1 offers the best data packs in terms of price and data allowance. The best place to buy a prepaid sim card is in the airport on arrival from the Changi Recommends Kiosks at Arrival Hall, Level 1. If you choose not to get it here, you can buy it from a Seven-Eleven convenience store
